caption:
Something new is on its way, and we can feel it in the air.

The Diega spring/summer collection has arrived at Blink, and it carries exactly what this season asks for — softness, colour, and the quiet joy of starting again. Relaxed shapes, beautiful prints, that unmistakable Parisian ease translated into island days. There is something almost effortless about the way these pieces move, like they already know where they are going.

Collection: @diega_paris

Only at Blink
